detail.description:
〓A light snow graces the shallow waters;
Amidst deepening storms, the plum flowers.〓
3.5th Anniversary Limited-Time Event [Silent Snow, Hidden Plum] Now Live!

Path to Nowhere is a SRPG featured by Real-time Tower Defense gameplay. 
  
[In the year N.F.112, you are appointed to be the Chief of MBCC]
